sections_cited: Section 8B of the Sales Tax Act

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Spl. STRA 768 of 2022 Spl. STRA 1182 of 2023 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of CMA No.4415/2022 3. For hearing of main case 24.12.2025 Mr. Munawar Ali Memon, advocate for the applicant Mr. Arshad Hussain Shehzad, advocate for respondent These matters pertain to Section 8B of the Sales Tax Act, 1990; it had been identified on the last date that the said issue had been decided in favour of the taxpayer by virtue of judgment reported as 2022 PTD 1781. Learned counsel for the applicant graciously states that the aforementioned judgment had been assailed by the department before the honourable Supreme Court in CPLA 1091 of 2022, however, leave has been declined therein. In view hereof learned counsel states that these reference applications may be dismissed as withdrawn. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 47 subsection 5 of Sales Tax Act, 1990. Office is instructed to place copy of this order in connected matter. Judge Judge Amjad
